w:r.w:t: Project methodology planning table exported from Markdown
Installation and setup of the development environment
As a user, I can create an account
As a user, I can log in securely
As a user, I can browse the list of products
As a user, I can view products by category
As a user, I can view products by brand
As a user, I can search for products using keywords
As a user, I can filter products by price
As a user, I can view product details
As an administrator, I can add products
As an administrator, I can update products
As an administrator, I can delete products
As an administrator, I can manage categories
As an administrator, I can manage brands
As a user, I can add products to the cart
As a user, I can remove products from the cart
As a user, I can update product quantities in the cart
As a user, I can place an order
As a user, I can enter shipping information during checkout
As a user, I can apply a coupon code during checkout
As a user, I can view my order history
As an administrator, I can view all orders
As an administrator, I can update the status of an order
As an administrator, I can manage product discounts
As an administrator, I can manage category discounts
As an administrator, I can manage flash sales
As an administrator, I can manage coupons
As an administrator, I can customize the homepage content
As a user, I can pay for my purchases securely online
As a user, I can reset my password if I forget it
As a user, I can interact with an intelligent chatbot during navigation
As a user, I can receive product recommendations according to my needs and budget
As a user, I can refine my search through the AI assistant
As an administrator, I can view analytics and performance indicators
As an administrator, I can monitor sales and top-performing products
As an administrator, I can detect low-stock products
